title: Crispy Italian Pistachio Salad
description: A floral, crispy, monsoon-inspired vegetarian dish featuring cardamom, grilled elements and pistachios.

ingredients.name: Grilled Zucchini
ingredients.notes: Sliced and grilled with a sprinkle of salt and pepper

ingredients.name: Grilled Shish Tare Carrots
ingredients.notes: Grilled, coated in a sweet soy glaze

instructions: Preheat grill or use indoor oven to reach about 375°F (190°C).
Toast pistachios in a dry pan over medium heat until fragrant and lightly golden, about 2 minutes.
Slice green bell pepper and onion thinly. Grill vegetables until tender but slightly charred on edges, about 4-6 minutes per side for each vegetable.
Toast sliced zucchini lightly in a skillet with salt and pepper, ensuring they get just a bit of color without burning.
Place grilled vegetables on a plate to cool down before assembly.
In a separate bowl, mix together pistachio nuts, toasted pistachios, and 1/4 cup vinaigrette dressing. Toss well until evenly coated.
Assemble the salad by layering grilled vegetables and pistachio mixture in a decorative fashion on a platter.
Drizzle additional vinaigrette over top for extra flavor and garnish with chopped fresh mint leaves if available.
